---
title: "Contact"
---

::: {style="display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 20px;"}
![](images/fg.jpg){style="width: 200px; flex-shrink: 0;"}

::: {}
**Frederic Guichard**  
Professor  
[Department of Biology](http://biology.mcgill.ca/index.html)  
Director  
[Quantitative Life Sciences (QLS)](https://www.mcgill.ca/qls)  

:::  
:::

**McGill University**  
1205 Docteur Penfield Avenue  
Montreal, Quebec, H3A 1B1  

**Office:** Stewart Biology Building, room N8/14  
**Phone:** 514-398-6464  
**Email:** frederic.guichard@mcgill.ca 

---

*Prospective graduate students and postdocs are welcome to get in touch by email.*
